example.name: feature_planning
example.scenario: User requests: "I want to add a newsletter signup section to the homepage."

step.guidance: Ask the user about placement, styling requirements, and data source.
step.example_question: Where should the newsletter section appear on the homepage? Options: 1) Below the hero section 2) In the footer area 3) As a modal popup 4) Use existing NewsletterSignup component

step.expected_output: - [ ] Review existing NewsletterSignup component structure - [ ] Design section placement and layout - [ ] Define integration points with state management - [ ] Write plan document to docs/ - [ ] Present plan for user review

actions.action: Include overview, objectives, steps, file changes, risks

step.expected_artifact:
File: docs/newsletter-homepage-plan.md Content structure: ## Overview Add newsletter signup section below hero on homepage.
## Objectives - Reuse existing NewsletterSignup component - Match existing styling patterns - No new dependencies
## Steps 1. Import NewsletterSignup in HomePage.tsx 2. Add section element after HeroSection 3. Apply glass-panel styling class 4. Test responsive layout
## File Changes - src/pages/HomePage.tsx — add import and section - No new files created
## Risks - Minimal: reuses existing component

example.completion: Plan saved to docs/newsletter-homepage-plan.md. Ready to switch to code mode for implementation upon approval.

example.name: refactoring_plan
example.scenario: User requests: "I need to refactor the cart system to support gift wrapping options."

actions.action: Check src/components/CartFlyout.tsx and CartPage.tsx for UI references

step.expected_output: - [ ] Analyze current cart data structures - [ ] Design gift wrapping type additions - [ ] Plan UI changes for cart flyout and page - [ ] Write plan document to docs/ - [ ] Present plan for user review

actions.action: Include type definitions, state changes, UI updates
After approval, use new_task to switch to code mode
Include plan path in delegation message

key_takeaways.takeaway: Complex refactors need detailed type-level planning
List ALL affected files to help user evaluate scope
